constitution.description: Define the foundational principles for your project

samples.name: Standard
samples.prompt: Create principles focused on code quality, testing standards, user experience consistency, and performance requirements

samples.name: Minimal
samples.prompt: Create minimal principles focused on essential code quality and basic testing

samples.name: Security focused
samples.prompt: Create principles focused on security best practices, threat modeling, input validation, authentication, and compliance requirements

specify.description: Create a detailed specification for a feature or component

samples.name: API endpoint
samples.prompt: Specify a REST API endpoint for user authentication with JWT tokens, including request/response schemas, error handling, and rate limiting

samples.name: UI component
samples.prompt: Specify a reusable data table component with sorting, filtering, pagination, and row selection support

samples.name: Background service
samples.prompt: Specify a background job processor that handles queued tasks with retry logic, dead-letter handling, and observability

plan.description: Generate an implementation plan from your specifications

samples.name: Full stack
samples.prompt: Create an implementation plan covering API, frontend, database migrations, and infrastructure changes

samples.name: Incremental
samples.prompt: Create a phased implementation plan with small deliverable milestones and rollback points

samples.name: Migration
samples.prompt: Create a migration plan to move from the current architecture to the target state with zero downtime

tasks.description: Break down the plan into actionable development tasks

samples.name: Sprint ready
samples.prompt: Break down the plan into sprint-ready tasks with acceptance criteria and estimated complexity

samples.name: Parallel tracks
samples.prompt: Create parallel task tracks for frontend and backend work with clear integration points

samples.name: Test driven
samples.prompt: Generate tasks that start with test definitions before implementation, following TDD methodology

implement.description: Implement the code based on specs, plan, and tasks

samples.name: Next task
samples.prompt: Implement the next pending task from the task list following the spec and plan

samples.name: With tests
samples.prompt: Implement the next task with unit tests and integration tests following the project's testing standards

samples.name: Infrastructure
samples.prompt: Implement the infrastructure-as-code changes defined in the plan using Bicep and azd
